title: brain db backup [--force-unblock] — --json success output
description: Produce a verified encrypted ledger backup bundle per ledger-backup-contract.md (SQLite Online Backup snapshot → single AEAD file, temp-then-rename, content-hash + schema stamp, retention prune keep-N + keep-forever-latest). On success advances backup_watermark.seq. With --force-unblock: an audited privileged override that clears the backup-unhealthy blocking set by recording an accepted RPO gap (emits a db.force_unblock ledger audit row, D6) even without a fresh verified backup. Key-accepting idempotency: a repeat with the same effective coverage is a no-op returning the prior backupRef.

backupRef.description: Stable identifier of the produced (or, when forced without a new cut, the latest) backup bundle.

seq.description: Highest audit seq this bundle durably covers.

healthy.description: Watermark health after the operation (true once coveredSeq == latest committed ledger seq).

forcedUnblock.description: Present only when --force-unblock cleared the blocking set without a fresh verified backup.

fromSeq.description: Watermark seq before the override (start of the accepted RPO gap).

toSeq.description: Latest ledger seq at override time (end of the accepted RPO gap).

prunedRefs.description: Backup refs removed by retention (keep-N); the keep-forever-latest is never pruned.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Produce a verified encrypted ledger backup; --force-unblock audibly clears the blocked state.

flags.description: Privileged-in-effect audited override: clear the backup-unhealthy blocking set by recording an accepted RPO gap without a fresh verified backup. Emits a db.force_unblock ledger audit row (D6).

sideEffects: writes a new AEAD backup bundle (temp-then-rename)
prunes backups per retention keep-N (keep-forever-latest retained)
with --force-unblock: writes a db.force_unblock ledger audit row
prohibitedEffects: no canonical/audit/trust git ref advanced by this command's own action (the backup is an out-of-band ledger snapshot)

errorCodes.when: the SQLite store file is missing or unopenable
the snapshot could not be written or verified
the backup AEAD key is not readable by the trusted-CLI identity
